01 / What we do

Three services.
One philosophy.

We don't sell products — we build clarity. Whether you're starting out, building wealth, or training a team, BBBwealth works the same way: structured, transparent, and grounded in evidence.

Financial Planning

A structured plan across the 12 key topics every household needs — cash flow, debt, protection, retirement, and beyond. From a single session to a 12-month engagement.

See plans →

Wealth Management

Investment, insurance & trust, debt, tax, and estate — coordinated so each piece supports the others. Built around your goals, not a product sheet.

See pillars →

Financial Training

HRD-claimable corporate training programmes that turn financial literacy into a workforce advantage. From investment fundamentals to full wellness curricula.

View programmes →
02 / About BBBwealth

An advisory practice built on trust.

BBBwealth is an independent Malaysian financial advisory firm. We help retail clients, families, and corporates make better decisions with their money — without the noise of product-pushing or jargon.

Our team brings together planning, wealth management, and training under one roof — so the advice you get is coordinated, evidence-based, and grounded in what's actually right for you.

03 / Financial planning

Plans that fit the question you're asking.

One-off clarity, ongoing partnership, or full-service stewardship. Pick the engagement that matches where you are — and graduate when you're ready.

Basic
Quick Guidance
RM500/ time

For individuals seeking quick guidance on a specific financial issue.

  • 1-month validity
  • 1 × 1.5-hour session
  • Pick 2 from 12 key topics
  • Suggested steps with follow-up
  • Standard support access
Most popular Complete
Ongoing Plan
RM1,999/ year

For those looking for ongoing support to improve overall financial health.

  • 12-month validity
  • 3 × 1-hour strategy sessions
  • Full plan across all 12 topics
  • Tailored solutions
  • Ongoing advisor access
Complete PLUS
Full Stewardship
RM2,999/ year

For those who want in-depth financial management and personalised strategies.

  • 12-month validity
  • 4 × 1-hour strategy sessions
  • Full plan across all 12 topics
  • Tailored solutions & written report
  • Priority advisor access
04 / Wealth management

Five pillars.
One balance sheet.

Most advisors sell one product and call it a strategy. We coordinate the full picture — so growth, protection, and legacy work together instead of against each other.

01

Investment

Portfolio construction across equities, fixed income, and alternatives — built on principle, not the trade of the day.

02

Insurance & Trust

Protection that covers the right risks at the right cost, structured through proper trust planning when appropriate.

03

Debt Management

Pay off, restructure, or leverage — depending on rate, term, and what the balance sheet actually needs.

04

Tax Planning

Legal, structural strategies to keep more of what you earn — for individuals, families, and Sdn Bhd owners.

05

Estate Planning

Wasiat, hibah, and trust structures so what you've built reaches the people you built it for — cleanly.

05 / Retirement calculator

Will your money outlast you?

Most people guess (agak-agak). Our free calculator runs your real numbers — EPF, salary growth, inflation, the 4% rule — and shows your retirement gap in seconds.

What's your Retirement Magic Number?

Answer a few questions about your salary, EPF, and savings — and see exactly how much you'll need, how much you're on track to have, and what it takes to close the gap.

EPF-aware projections Inflation-adjusted 4% rule corpus target Free · No sign-up
Let's find out →
Wealth Projection

06 / Corporate training

HRD-claimable.
Workforce-ready.

Financial stress quietly drains productivity. Our training programmes give your team the tools — and the confidence — to handle money well, on and off the clock.

4 Hours · Half-day HRD Claimable

Investment Fundamentals

For teams new to investing
  • Understanding different investment types and asset classes
  • Risk assessment and portfolio diversification strategies
  • Market analysis and investment decision-making
  • Building a long-term investment mindset
  • Practical tools for tracking and evaluation
8 Hours · Full-day HRD Claimable

Financial Wellness Program

Holistic personal finance for employees
  • Personal budgeting and expense management
  • Debt management and elimination strategies
  • Emergency fund planning and savings optimisation
  • Insurance needs analysis and protection planning
  • Retirement planning and goal setting
